## Description

Please provide a clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you're requesting.

## Problem Statement

What problem or need does this feature address?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like to see this implemented?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered alternative approaches?

## Alignment with Ethical AI MY

How does this feature align with our ethical principles and governance model?

- [ ] Fairness – Promotes equitable outcomes
- [ ] Transparency – Improves clarity
- [ ] Accountability – Strengthens responsibility
- [ ] Privacy – Protects data
- [ ] Benefit – Creates positive impact

**Explanation:**

## Potential Impact

What positive impact could this feature have?

## Stakeholders Affected

Who would benefit from or be affected by this feature?

## Additional Context

Please provide any additional information or context.

## Code of Conduct

- [ ] I have read and agree to follow the Code of Conduct
- [ ] I am making this suggestion respectfully and constructively
